datasheet.text: In your Shooting phase , each time this model is selected to shoot, if it has not shot with its Deathstrike missile this battle, you can do one of the following in addition to resolving this model’s ranged attacks: Designate Target: If this model does not have a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, place a unique Deathstrike Target marker for this model anywhere on the battlefield. Adjust Target: If this model has a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, move that marker to anywhere else on the battlefield.
datasheet.name: Deathstrike Missile

Adjust Target: If this model has a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, move that marker to anywhere else on the battlefield.
